2384660.name: FPV SkyDive - Micro Drone Edition
2384660.description:
Introducing the Micro Drone Edition DLC, the ultimate package designed to enhance your micro FPV drone flying experience! Whether you’re a seasoned pilot or just starting out, this DLC brings the most comprehensive collection of micro drone content to elevate your skills and enjoyment.

This structure ensures continuous expansion with micro-type drones, maps, tracks, and special features, keeping the FPV experience fresh and ever-evolving.

Here are highlights of Micro Drone Edition DLC:

Police Station

Police Station is a thrilling addition to the micro drone map collection. It lets you explore a detailed law enforcement facility from the FPV perspective, focusing on tight indoor areas and complex corridors. Featuring four exclusive racetracks, unique challenges, and a dynamic map, it’s built for precision flying and intense action.

Miami Heatwave

Miami Heatwave is an exciting addition to micro drone maps and content we have in our arsenal. It brings classic urban summer feeling for you to experience from the FPV perspective. Featuring four exclusive racetracks, challenges and dynamic map.

Japan Pack

The Japan Pack, created in collaboration with WTW (Wednesday Tokyo Whoopers), brings the vibrant world of Japanese micro FPV drone racing to life. Featuring four dynamic racetracks, challenges and a beautifully designed Garden map.

Wider selection of micro drones

To further enhance your experience, alongside the ORQA Whoop, the baseline micro drone available in the simulator, we’re introducing three more micro drones:

  • Bolt – a high-speed racing micro drone designed for competitive flying.

  • Cloud – built for agile movement and easy handling, perfect for smooth freestyle flights.

  • Cinewhoop - a stable and precise micro drone tailored for cinematic shots and close-quarters flying.

Night Fever racing tracks

A game-changing addition to micro drone racing comes in the form of night time gym racing tracks, featuring neon gates and dynamic visual effects. This electrifying atmosphere creates an unforgettable racing experience, pushing your skills to the limit.

Full list of features included in this DLC:

  • Miami Heatwave pack (including: map, exclusive whoop micro challenges and race tracks)

  • Japan Pack (including: map, exclusive whoop micro challenges and race tracks)

  • Police Station (including: map, exclusive whoop micro challenges and race tracks)

  • 4x exclusive whoop Night Fever race tracks

  • Parking Garage map

  • Drones: Bolt, Cloud and Cinewhoop
2384660.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
